strategy_name: Evolutionary Trading Algo — Full-Stack Paper Promotion Gate
description: Promotion request to advance the EVOLUTIONARY TRADING ALGO 4-piece funnel (MNQ engine, NQ hybrid, Crypto seed grid, ETH/SOL/XRP casino perps) from scaffolded-and-verified to paper-trading phase. All blockers from the initial CRYPTO_PERP_ETH_SOL_XRP_v1 GO verdict have been addressed: real Bybit v5 HMAC signing, Tradovate OAuth2 with 3-leg OSO brackets, circuit-breaker router, full obs stack (metrics/alerts/logger/heartbeat), MAD-cleaned data pipeline, walk-forward gate wired to DSR+PSR, Koinly/§1256 tax automation, preflight abort-on-red. 220/220 tests passing, 17/17 verify_all.
hypothesis: The full infrastructure is production-ready: pipeline is end-to-end wired and tested, venues have real signing, observability is live, risk brakes are enforced, and the Firm's own walk-forward demo correctly KILL-gates on 36% OOS degradation (threshold 35%). Moving to paper now will harvest the only data that still matters — live execution latency, actual fill realism, operational drift — before we touch real capital.

entries.mnq: Paper-traded since 2026-04 with existing eta_v3 pine spec — baseline $5k paper acct, target $5.5k
entries.nq: Scale-up of proven MNQ behavior once MNQ paper clears 4 weeks with expectancy > +0.3R
entries.crypto_seed: 40-level geometric grid on BTCUSDT + directional overlay when confluence > 7 (paper only)
entries.eth_sol_xrp_perps: Confluence-gated 5/15m entries from 5-feature scorer; reject any trade with confluence < 5 or max_lev < 5x

exits.daily_loss_kill: 6% daily loss -> halt bot 24h, alert Telegram
exits.dd_kill: 20% peak-to-trough DD -> halt + Firm re-review required
exits.preflight_abort: Any of 5 preflight checks RED -> refuse to start live loop

promotion_criteria.any_bot_to_live_tiny: 4 weeks paper clear + Firm re-review GO + tiny size (1 contract / $50 crypto) for 2 more weeks
promotion_criteria.casino_tier_unlock: Only after MNQ+NQ demonstrate positive expectancy on live-tiny for 30 trades each
promotion_criteria.staking_activation: Only after total realized gain > $1000 on live-tiny, per 60/30/10 sweep

firm_eval_fields.notes: Synthetic GBM backtest validates pipeline mechanics only. Paper phase is where real edge is measured. OOS degradation > 35% on synthetic is expected and reflects correct gate behavior, not strategy failure.
